provenance: FALLBACK: raw TNDA-HAR is behind IEEE DataPort sign-in (https://ieee-dataport.org/open-access/tnda-har-0, DOI 10.21227/4epb-pg26). Source used is the UniMTS-released preprocessed bundle (HuggingFace xiyuanz/UniMTS -> UniMTS_data/TNDA-HAR). Bundle samples are native-rate (50 Hz) 10 s segments; the right-wrist IMU is columns 12:18. Accelerometer is total acceleration in m/s^2 (gravity present, |acc|~9.8); gyroscope in rad/s. The bundle carries no per-sample subject id, so the `subject` field records the UniMTS train/test partition, not individual participants (original dataset has 23 subjects).
